svg.title: KBAgent — blueprint cuối cùng
svg.desc: Kiến trúc evolvable system với 3 layer: Goals, Main loop, Unified Knowledge Graph. Kèm Dashboard UI và SVFactory context.
svg.text: Layer 0 — Goals (invariant · human-only · shared across all projects)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Goal: luôn tồn tại, không tự đóng. criteria[] được Measure step evaluate. Status: active | warning | superseded.')
sendPrompt('Sub-goals: own criteria, :SERVES → parent Goal. Test scenarios là sub-goals của hệ.')
sendPrompt('Master Rules: ontology contract, policy, governance. Domain-agnostic — repo_origin do user khai báo.')

svg.text: Layer 1 — Main loop (evolvable · human-gated at every decision point)
Intent sources — cả hai cần human approve + goal alignment check

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Goal alignment check: in-goal → proceed. Out-of-goal → warning → human: backlog / exception / bẻ goal.')
g.text: in-goal → proceed · out-of-goal → warning → human: backlog / exception / bẻ goal

g.onclick: sendPrompt('① Generate: intent approved → backlog → activate. Link intent to Goal via :SERVES.')
sendPrompt('② Execute: Copilot suggest → human approve → kbx CLI bridge (deterministic exit 0/1).')
sendPrompt('③ Retrospective: điểm DUY NHẤT ghi vào Unified Graph. Evidence, lesson, :ADVANCES edges, chaos snapshot.')
sendPrompt('④ Measure: chaos score (7 dimensions) + aggregate :ADVANCES edges → update criteria.current → emit signals.')

svg.text: next cycle — idles if no intent in backlog
③ Retro writes to graph — only write point
Layer 2 — Unified Knowledge Graph (domain-agnostic · written only at ③ Retro)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Unified Knowledge Graph: 1 DB thay 4 GraphDB cũ. Evidence metadata bắt buộc trên mọi node và edge.')
g.text: 1 DB · evidence on every node + edge · domain-agnostic ontology contract

g.onclick: sendPrompt(':Goal — title, horizon, criteria[], status active|warning|superseded')
sendPrompt(':Intent — unified state machine, type exec|fix|exception, linked_goal_id, repos[]')
sendPrompt(':KBDoc — 16-tier path, frontmatter, verification state, source_of_truth flag')
sendPrompt(':Code — file path, language, cyclomatic complexity, fan-in, linked_intent')
sendPrompt(':Signal — chaos snapshot, level stable|manageable|unstable|chaotic, delta, timestamp')
sendPrompt(':Release — version, released_at, linked intents, catalog entry')
sendPrompt(':Lesson — domain, level, lifecycle proposed→enforced, linked intent')

svg.text: Evidence metadata — bắt buộc trên mọi node và edge
source · confidence · timestamp · linked_intent_id · version · repo_origin (user-defined)
"node X ảnh hưởng tới những gì?"
Goal change · Intent approve · Goal alignment · Exception · Retrospective sign-off · Maintain fix approve
Auto: Signal detector propose · Chaos score compute · criteria.current aggregate · graph write at Retro
